---
title: "Dr. Gang He"
image: files/gang-he-profile.jpeg
#page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: /posts
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    page-size: 0 #set as 0 will remove the page setting
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 80%
  links:
    - icon: sun
      text: Mainpage
      href: https://www.ganghe.net
    - icon: globe
      text: SBUpage
      href: https://www.stonybrook.edu/commcms/est/people/core_faculty/ghe.php
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:gang.he@stonybrook.edu
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/drganghe
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/DrGangHe
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://mastodon.social/@hegang      
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/hegang
    - icon: lightbulb
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8416-1965  
    - icon: archive
      text: Scopus
      href: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=55607981900
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=vf90AuEAAAAJ
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Research Gate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gang-He-19
---

<link rel="me" href="https://mastodon.social/@hegang">


:::{#hero-heading}

Dr. He is an energy scholar, researcher, and teacher. He is an assistant professor in the Department of Technology and Society at Stony Brook University. He studies energy systems modeling, energy and climate policy, and clean energy transition.

Dr. He has published more than 40 peer reviewed journal papers, including papers in high-impact interdisciplinary and field journals such as [*Nature*](/posts/2022-10-nature-cost-savings-of-global-solar-pv-value-chains/index.qmd), [*Nature Communications*](/posts/2020-05-ncomms-rapid-re-cost/index.qmd), [*One Earth*](/posts/2020-08-oneearth-coal-just-transition/index.qmd), [*Environmental Science \& Technology*](/posts/2016-est-switch-china/index.qmd), [*Energy Policy*](/posts/2014-ep-china-provincial-wind-resource-assessment/index.qmd). His research was reported by *Nature*, *Scientific American*, *Carbon Brief*, *National Geographic*, *New York Times*, *E\&E News*, among others. 

Dr. He’s work has direct policy impacts, he has testified for the [New York State Climate Leadership and Community Protection Act](/posts/2019-nyclcpa-testimony/index.qmd) before it became law, he has advised New York State Climate Action Council’s [Scoping Plan](/posts/2021-12-nysclcpa-scoping-plan-draft/index.qmd). Dr. He also involved in the U.S.-China collaboration on energy and climate change. 

:::

Dr. He’s most recent analysis on the cost savings of global solar PV supply chains was published by [*Nature*](/posts/2022-10-nature-cost-savings-of-global-solar-pv-value-chains/index.qmd), and he was awarded the [Best Poster Award](/posts/2022-12-iamc-2022-best-poster-award/index.qmd) by the Integrated Assessment Modeling Consortium for this work. He was selected as Youth Delegate to UNFCCC CoP11 (2005), Asia 21 Young Leaders (2007), Aspen Environment Forum Scholars (2011), Young Scholar of Institute for New Economic Thinking (2013), and ITIF Energy Innovation Policy and Management Scholar (2019). 

Dr. He has worked for the [Program on Energy and Sustainable Development](https://pesd.fsi.stanford.edu/people/Gang_He) at Stanford University. He received his Ph.D. in [Energy and Resources](https://erg.berkeley.edu/people/gang-he/) from University of California at Berkeley. He also holds an M.A. in climate and society from Columbia University, and a B.S. in Geography from Peking University.

## Recent Posts
Check out the latest &nbsp;[Papers](posts.qmd#category=paper)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[News](posts.qmd#category=news)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Events](posts.qmd#category=event)&nbsp;, and &nbsp;[More »](/posts.qmd)

:::{#recent-posts}
:::
